featuresPage.title: Powerful Features To
featuresPage.subtitle1: Our AI analyzes your profile and job requirements to
featuresPage.subtitle2: deliver personalized insights and smart preparation.

feature1.title: AI Interview Questions
feature1.description: Get role-specific technical and behavioral questions tailored to the job.

feature2.title: Resume Analysis
feature2.description: Deep analysis of your resume to highlight strengths and weaknesses.

feature3.title: Skill Gap Detection
feature3.description: Identify the skills you're missing and improve your chances.

feature4.title: Personalized Plan
feature4.description: Get a day-wise preparation plan customized to your needs.

feature5.title: Smart Suggestions
feature5.description: AI-powered suggestions to improve your profile and prepare better.

feature6.description: Know how well your profile matches the job requirements.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your interview preparation.

howItWorks.title: How It
howItWorks.subtitle: Generate your personalized interview strategy in 3 easy steps.

step1.title: Upload Resume
step1.description: Upload your resume in PDF or DOCX format. Our AI will analyze it thoroughly.

step2.title: Add Job Description
step2.description: Paste the job description so AI can understand the requirements.

step3.title: Get AI Report
step3.description: Receive your personalized interview report with questions, skill gaps and preparation plan.

faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions
faq.answer1: AI Interview Pro is an AI-powered platform that analyzes your profile and job requirements to create a personalized interview preparation plan.
faq.question2: How does the AI generate interview questions?
faq.answer2: Our AI analyzes the job description, required skills, and your profile to generate relevant technical and behavioral interview questions.
faq.answer3: Yes. Your resume and personal information are processed securely and are never shared with third parties without your consent.
faq.answer4: You can upload resumes in PDF and DOCX formats. We recommend using a well-structured resume for the best analysis results.
faq.answer5: Yes. After analysis, you can download your interview report and preparation plan for future reference.
faq.answer6: Refund eligibility depends on your subscription plan and usage. Please contact our support team for assistance.
